nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, the number of sections, the number of leaf questions, the number of attempt rules configured, the number of approved answer keys, and the number of boards using it, ordered by boards using it descending.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.title, COUNT(DISTINCT qs.id) AS num_sections, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN q.max_marks IS NOT NULL THEN q.id END) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT ar.id) AS num_attempt_rules, COUNT(DISTINCT ak.id) AS num_approved_answer_keys, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_boards USING qp.id FROM question_paper qp JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = qp.id JOIN question_section qs ON qs.qp_id = qp.id JOIN question q ON q.section_id = qs.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id WHERE sa.is_active = TRUE AND q.max_marks IS NOT NULL AND ak.status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY qp.title ORDER BY num_boards DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (board, answer_key, question_section, question, question_paper, script_assignment). You must qualify it with a table alias.
